session.user: Run pytest on tests/commands/pr/ and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the tests/commands/pr/ directory and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on tests/commands/pr/ with verbose output
